'''âl-f-h''' ('''kalafah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhotacize|rhotacize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhotacize|rhotacize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-f-h
|-
! Lemma
| kalafah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilafah|thilafah]] || [[word:jilafah|jilafah]] || [[word:shilafah|shilafah]] || [[word:kilafah|kilafah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulafah|thuthulafah]] || [[word:jujulafah|jujulafah]] || [[word:shushulafah|shushulafah]] || [[word:kukulafah|kukulafah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulafah|thulafah]] || [[word:julafah|julafah]] || [[word:shulafah|shulafah]] || [[word:kulafah|kulafah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulafah|thulafah]] || [[word:julafah|julafah]] || [[word:shulafah|shulafah]] || [[word:kulafah|kulafah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelafah|thelafah]] || [[word:jelafah|jelafah]] || [[word:shelafah|shelafah]] || [[word:kelafah|kelafah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholafah|thotholafah]] || [[word:jojolafah|jojolafah]] || [[word:shosholafah|shosholafah]] || [[word:kokolafah|kokolafah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholafah|tholafah]] || [[word:jolafah|jolafah]] || [[word:sholafah|sholafah]] || [[word:kolafah|kolafah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholafah|tholafah]] || [[word:jolafah|jolafah]] || [[word:sholafah|sholafah]] || [[word:kolafah|kolafah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlafah|thĂŠlafah]] || [[word:jĂŠlafah|jĂŠlafah]] || [[word:shĂŠlafah|shĂŠlafah]] || [[word:kĂŠlafah|kĂŠlafah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalafah|thathalafah]] || [[word:jajalafah|jajalafah]] || [[word:shashalafah|shashalafah]] || [[word:kakalafah|kakalafah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalafah|thalafah]] || [[word:jalafah|jalafah]] || [[word:shalafah|shalafah]] || [[word:kalafah|kalafah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalafah|thalafah]] || [[word:jalafah|jalafah]] || [[word:shalafah|shalafah]] || [[word:kalafah|kalafah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalafah|shalafah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalafah|goshalafah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalafah|gokishalafah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalafahnĂŒ|shalafahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalafahnknĂŒ|goshalafahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalafahnĂŒ|gokishalafahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalafahshĂ«|shalafahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalafahnkshĂ«|goshalafahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalafahshĂ«|gokishalafahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalafahro|shalafahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalafahnkro|goshalafahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalafahro|gokishalafahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalafahmu|shalafahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalafahnkmu|goshalafahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalafahmu|gokishalafahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalafahsher|shalafahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalafahnksher|goshalafahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalafahsher|gokishalafahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalafahng|shalafahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalafahnkng|goshalafahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalafahng|gokishalafahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalafahya|shalafahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalafahnkya|goshalafahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalafahya|gokishalafahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalafahyam|shalafahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalafahnkyam|goshalafahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalafahyam|gokishalafahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalafahnĂŒshĂ«|shalafahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalafahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalafahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalafahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalafahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalafahnĂŒro|shalafahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalafahnknĂŒro|goshalafahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalafahnĂŒro|gokishalafahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalafahnĂŒmu|shalafahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalafahnknĂŒmu|goshalafahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalafahnĂŒmu|gokishalafahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalafahshĂ«nĂŒ|shalafahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalafahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalafahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalafahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalafahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalafahshĂ«ro|shalafahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalafahnkshĂ«ro|goshalafahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalafahshĂ«ro|gokishalafahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalafahshĂ«mu|shalafahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalafahnkshĂ«mu|goshalafahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalafahshĂ«mu|gokishalafahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalafahronĂŒ|shalafahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalafahnkronĂŒ|goshalafahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalafahronĂŒ|gokishalafahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalafahroshĂ«|shalafahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalafahnkroshĂ«|goshalafahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalafahroshĂ«|gokishalafahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalafahromu|shalafahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalafahnkromu|goshalafahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalafahromu|gokishalafahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalafahmunĂŒ|shalafahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalafahnkmunĂŒ|goshalafahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalafahmunĂŒ|gokishalafahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalafahmushĂ«|shalafahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalafahnkmushĂ«|goshalafahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalafahmushĂ«|gokishalafahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalafahmuro|shalafahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalafahnkmuro|goshalafahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalafahmuro|gokishalafahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
